name_regex.description: A regular expression to filter DNS resolver rules based on their names.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the resolver rule.

resolver_endpoint_id.description: The ID of the resolver endpoint that the rule is associated with.

rule_type.description: The type of resolver rule, such as FORWARD or SYSTEM.

share_status.description: The sharing status of the resolver rule, indicating if it is shared with other AWS accounts.
